title: Drafter / BIM Modeller
description:
Kenyon provides multi-trade services to the Bio-pharmaceutical industry, semiconductor plants, ultra-high purity gas industry and for high-end corporation fitting-out projects.

Our annual gross revenue is in excess of S$200 million and we have more than 490 staff in Singapore.

Kenyon Pte Ltd is located at the Kenyon Building, No. 8 Loyang Crescent, Singapore 509016.

Website : www.kenyon.com.sg


Roles & Responsibilities

1) Working together with Designer, M&E Consultant,  Project Manager and Engineers to develop shop drawings

2) Responsible for all drawings for interior fit-out project (Architectural, ACMV, Electrical, fire protection, plumbing and sanitary)

3) Co-ordinates with site staffs to prepare combined services drawings and highlight areas of possible collision for the project team,

4) Deriving of details drawing, check and review drawings before submission.

5) Distribute approved drawings to site team for construction

6) Maintain and update of drawings in accordance to change orders

7) Producing as-installed drawings by co-ordinating with site staffs and visit site for verification

8) Assist in site administrative task or quantifying with relevant parties


Requirement

1) Good knowledge of software such as AutoCad, Revit, Navisworks or Sketchup

2)  At least 3 years (Drafter) or 5 years (BIM Modeller) working experience in related field

3) Must be team player, good interpersonal skills and with a “can-do” attitude

4) Excellent time management skills in managing modelling and drafting works.

5) Ensure all models and drawings comply with Execution Plans, project workflows, and guidelines. Upkeep the record of BIM/Drawing versions and ensure BIM deliverables and documentation follow BEP or requirement/instruction as stipulated.

6) Ability to take multi-task in a fast paced and dynamic environment

postedCompany.description:
Kenyon Pte Ltd was founded in 1988 to undertake mechanical and electrical (M&E) projects for chemical and petrochemical process companies. Over the years, we have consolidated our experiences and expertise and moved into more capital and knowledge intensive projects. We have also established regional offices in China, in Suzhou, Chengdu and Tianjin, to support our growing operations there.

Today, our group includes more than 150 experienced engineers and designers undertaking projects incorporate renovation, M&E works, and high-purity piping. Our client includes banks, trading houses, electronic industry, life sciences, chemical plants and special high purity gas industries with a focus in corporate renovation and bio-pharmaceutical plant construction. Kenyon also fabricates pharmaceutical modular process skids, ultra high purity gas blending panels and manufactures ETFE coated ducts and dampers.

Kenyon aims to be a one-stop solutions provider for all its clients’ engineering needs.

We currently have a staff in excess of 900, half in Singapore and the remainder in our 3 Chinese offices in Suzhou, Chengdu and Tianjin.
postedCompany.name: KENYON PTE. LTD.
